name: rabinacollection
description: Rabina Closet — Full-stack fashion storefront (Vite + Express + MongoDB)

scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.clean: cd client && rmdir /s /q dist 2>nul & cd ../server && rmdir /s /q node_modules 2>nul

author: Rabina Closet
